title: rosa viscaria var. aeduensis
intro: Rosa viscaria var. aeduensis, also known as the Edelrosen or Aeduisian Rose, is a subspecies of the alpine rose plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Rosa viscaria var. aeduensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
